title: Valid Parentheses
description:
Given a string `s` containing just the characters `(`, `)`, `{`, `}`, `[` and `]`, determine if the input string is valid.

An input string is valid if open brackets are closed by the same type of brackets, and in the correct order.
hints: Push opening brackets. On a closing bracket, the top of the stack must be the matching opener.
If the stack is empty when you try to close, or non-empty at the end — invalid.
